title: Coed Gwempa
summary: Coed Gwempa is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales. It is managed by the Woodland Trust, who describe it as mixed native woodland and ancient trees with abundant floral species like bluebell, meadowsweet and dog violet. Dormice have also been observed.
text: Coed Gwempa is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales. It is managed by the Woodland Trust, who describe it as mixed native woodland and ancient trees with abundant floral species like bluebell, meadowsweet and dog violet. Dormice have also been observed.
